scripts.api:daemon:start: sh -c 'nohup node scripts/api-supervisor.mjs > /tmp/redxpma-api-supervisor.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /tmp/redxpma-api-supervisor.pid && echo API supervisor started with PID $(cat /tmp/redxpma-api-supervisor.pid)'
scripts.api:daemon:ensure: sh -c 'if [ -f /tmp/redxpma-api-supervisor.pid ] && kill -0 $(cat /tmp/redxpma-api-supervisor.pid) 2>/dev/null; then echo API supervisor already running; else npm run api:daemon:start; fi'
scripts.api:daemon:stop: sh -c 'if [ -f /tmp/redxpma-api-supervisor.pid ]; then kill $(cat /tmp/redxpma-api-supervisor.pid) 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /tmp/redxpma-api-supervisor.pid; fi; if [ -f /tmp/redxpma-api-supervisor-child.pid ]; then kill $(cat /tmp/redxpma-api-supervisor-child.pid) 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /tmp/redxpma-api-supervisor-child.pid; fi; echo API supervisor stopped'
scripts.api:daemon:status: sh -c 'if [ -f /tmp/redxpma-api-supervisor.pid ] && kill -0 $(cat /tmp/redxpma-api-supervisor.pid) 2>/dev/null; then echo Supervisor PID: $(cat /tmp/redxpma-api-supervisor.pid); else echo Supervisor is not running; fi; if lsof -nP -iTCP:4000 -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; then lsof -nP -iTCP:4000 -sTCP:LISTEN; else echo API is not listening on port 4000; fi'
scripts.api:bg:start: sh -c 'nohup npm run api:nowatch > /tmp/redxpma-api.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /tmp/redxpma-api.pid && echo API started with PID $(cat /tmp/redxpma-api.pid)'
scripts.api:bg:stop: sh -c 'if [ -f /tmp/redxpma-api.pid ]; then kill $(cat /tmp/redxpma-api.pid) 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /tmp/redxpma-api.pid; echo API stopped; else echo No API pid file found; fi'
scripts.api:bg:status: sh -c 'if lsof -nP -iTCP:4000 -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; then lsof -nP -iTCP:4000 -sTCP:LISTEN; else echo API is not listening on port 4000; fi'
